/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--enable-auto-import "CMakeFiles/s2n_test_mismatched_curves.dir/cygdrive/c/Users/samue/repos/auto-win-msvc/rewritten_src/tests/unit/s2n_test_mismatched_curves.c.o" "CMakeFiles/s2n_test_mismatched_curves.dir/cygdrive/c/Users/samue/repos/auto-win-msvc/dummy_main.c.o" -o bin/s2n_test_mismatched_curves.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib/libs2n_test_mismatched_curves.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  lib/libtestss2n.a lib/libs2n.a _deps/auto_win_msvc-build/libauto-win-msvc.a -lws2_32 -ldbghelp -ladvapi32 -lnetapi32 -luserenv -lole32 -lpsapi -ldl -lrt -lm
